title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment · Extension Lens: Deployment
summary: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext deployment increment in a local and remote transport deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose local process or remote service deployment from access, trust, scale, and operations needs.
Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Defend the Deployment model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Deployment applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.
